title: Rhacodiscus moricandianus
taxonomy: Rhacodiscus moricandianus is classified within the family Saxifragaceae and is a member of the genus Rhacodiscus. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is further classified as a flowering plant. The species is native to China and is a part of the rhododendron family, however it does not belong to the rhododendron genus. Rhacodiscus moricandianus is more closely related to the saxifrage family, which also includes the genus Saxifraga. It is a unique plant species with distinct characteristics.
